## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss automation strategies and content creation for Deepgram, focusing on leveraging fwd.digital's expertise in programmatic content generation and outbound marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to creating industry-specific and use case-specific content pages for Deepgram's Learn section](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Implement programmatic SEO strategy with 100+ new pages, using fwd.digital's content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Explore outbound marketing automation using tools like Clay and SmartLeads.ai for scalable, personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Transform weekly meetings into editorial sessions, treating Deepgram as a new client for fwd.digital's content services](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Move from operational support to leveraging fwd.digital's content expertise](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Focus on creating programmatic, industry-specific, and use case-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Utilize fwd.digital's robust editorial team (40+ freelancers, 5 new managing editors)](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Aim to publish content at scale (10 million words/month capacity)](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Targeted Content Creation

  - [Develop pages for specific industries (e.g., healthcare, restaurants) and use cases (e.g., appointment scheduling, order taking)](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Create content clusters around topics like "AI Voice Agents for \[Industry/Use Case\]"](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Implement tagging system to manage new content without overwhelming main blog/learn sections](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Cross-link new pages with existing product pages for improved SEO and user journey](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Use AI-powered research and knowledge base creation](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Implement multi-step content creation workflow: research, outline, generation, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Incorporate human review and fact-checking stages](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Utilize image generation tools (e.g., Midjourney) for visuals](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Outbound Marketing Automation

  - [Implement email warming strategies for 20-30 IPs/domains](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [Scale to 30-40k emails/month using tools like Clay and SmartLeads.ai](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Focus on highly personalized outreach with AI-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Manage domain reputation and swap out flagged domains efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)

### Integration and Tools

  - [Explore Clay as a potential replacement for Seamless](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)
  - [Discuss integration challenges with existing tools (e.g., Salesforce)](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
  - [Consider separate tracking for outbound campaigns to avoid clogging main CRM](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2528.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a detailed recap and set up Airtable for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Assign a managing editor from fwd.digital to the Deepgram project](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [Determine placement strategy for new content pages (likely in Learn section with custom tagging)](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
  - [Skip next week's meeting due to Thanksgiving; reconvene in two weeks with progress update](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)
  - [Alexa to review and approve content placement strategy in Learn section](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2742.0)
  - [Sam and Caitlin to explore implementing outbound marketing automation playbook](https://fathom.video/share/5a5oQ1u988JS-CG6VLmX-MMwTPr-pC2Y?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
